args.prompt: Extract any update on regulatory review, shareholder vote results, or changes to merger timeline from this 8-K: {{us_steel_8k_20240402}}

call.purpose: Extract regulatory and shareholder vote updates from April 2, 2024 8-K

payload.output: Based on the provided 8-K filing, there are no updates on regulatory review, shareholder vote results, or changes to the merger timeline. The filing only includes supplemental disclosures to the proxy statement in response to demand letters from stockholders, and explicitly states that these disclosures will not change the timing of the special meeting or the consideration to be paid.
